train_track.title: Build a Steam 'n' Rails train line connecting two locations at least 200 blocks apart

conductor.title: Create a Conductor mob to automate your train (Steam 'n' Rails Conductor's Cap)

subtitle.text: The train does not care about the distance. That is why you built it.

description: Steam 'n' Rails extends Create trains into a full rail network.
Wide gauge for cargo. Narrow gauge for tight tunnels.
A Conductor mob manages train automation.
Craft the Conductor's Cap and place it on an Andesite Alloy Casing.
Train networks change the logistics of the base.
Oil runs through pipes. Goods run on rail.
The factory connects to the mine connects to the farm.
Controls: R = toggle sails, I = inventory.
→ Build a train line 200+ blocks long [check]
→ Create a Conductor for automated train routing [check]
